source_pr.title: store/tikv: use grpc
source_pr.body:
Hi,

This PR replaces the protocol interaction with PD/TiKV to GRPC.

PTAL @coocood @tiancaiamao @disksing @siddontang

symptoms: + // Don't call cancel in success path due to a race in Go 1.6: | result = tk.MustQuery(`select json_type(a) from test_json tj order by tj.id`) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: + // Don't call cancel in success path due to a race in Go 1.6: | result = tk.MustQuery(`select json_type(a) from test_json tj order by tj.id`) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: + // Don't call cancel in success path due to a race in Go 1.6: | result = tk.MustQuery(`select json_type(a) from test_json tj order by tj.id`) (executor/executor_test.go)
